# Recompact12 Spec15k Contract

## Recompact 1.2
full compaction min recompact growth defaults to 1.2% so long sessions can reclaim again sooner after a compact

## Spec 1.5k
speculative pre-turn buffer defaults to 1.5k tokens for earlier preemptive compact without over-triggering
